pr.title: db migration: add invoices.tax_region column (closes #722)
pr.body:
Adds the `tax_region` column to `invoices` so the new EU VAT logic from #722 has somewhere to read from. The migration is forward-only; the rollback path is documented in the migration file header. Discussed and approved in #720.

The migration touches only the `invoices` table; no application code in this PR reads it yet (that lands in #723).
pr.author: octocat
